title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: DELTA OAKS CLINIC SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 1022 Green Acres Road Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: -Age 21-49 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 50 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon -Have a household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Women ages 50-64, or women 65 and older who are not enrolled in Medicare Part B, are eligible for breast, cervical, and genetic services. Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Clinic hours and ScreenWise appointments: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3550 Screenwise (888) 255-7070 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement. Screenwise intake packets available in multiple languages. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus routes 66 and 67 Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DELTA OAKS CLINIC
